items.name_en: Mini Puzzle geometric bag ًں‘„L New model puzzle miniًں‘‰Mini No.10173, the most sought-after bag of 2019 âœ”ï¸ڈ Same style as Mengwei Qiwei He Sui... Loewe latest model uses imported calfskin, German imported Saffiano thread, YKK custom hardware. Don't let it be mini, it's super spacious, can hold plus size lipstick and powder with no pressure. Suitable for petite cute girls, also suitable for tall fairies. Size: 18أ—12.5أ—8cm [Comes with counter packaging]

items.name_en: LOâ„®wâ„®ًںŒںMediumًں†•Nappa Squeeze Handbagًں‘œAn exquisite and soft new handbag made of soft-touch Nappa leather. This handbag is a masterpiece of traditional craftsmanship, innovative research, and unique design, featuring a surprisingly lightweight wrinkled body, adjustable donut chain, and soft-touch handle. This medium version is made of Nappa lambskin. *Can be worn on shoulder, crossbody, or handheld* Adjustable chain strap with Anagram engraved pebbles, extra chain included to extend the strap further *Magnetic closure *Internal zip pocket *Unlined *lo*ewe gold or silver hot stamping.

items.name_en: ًں”¥New Paseo Chain Style Small Dumpling Bagًں”¥ Imported Nappa leather creates a lazy yet high-class vibeًں’¥ Exquisite craftsmanship, simple and elegant silhouetteًںŒ¹ Beauty and utility combined, can be carried by hand, over shoulder, or crossbody, capacity is also greatًںŒ· Suitable for French elegance, modern style, and sweet cool style alike. The handle goes through the body, bringing a unique soft and ultra-light pleated structureًں’„ "Paseo" is the new form of the L0ًں’‹ewe dumpling bag! This bag, which appears most often on the runway, is named "Paseo" ًں‘œ Meaning "stroll" in Spanish, it has a casual yet playful styleًں’„ The bag features a streamlined look, shaped like a dumplingâ­گï¸ڈ The handle is a drawstring design, with knotted buckle elements on both sides continuing the Flamenco series, top zipper closure, and reinforced with circular stitching at the bottomًںŒ‍ Simple yet full of details, overall atmospheric and softًںژپ Size: 35~21~11.5CM
